products.subtitle: We build products that solve real problems. Here are the solutions we've crafted to transform industries.

sphynx.description: A comprehensive hotel management platform powered by artificial intelligence. Designed for the hospitality industry to streamline operations, enhance guest experiences, and drive revenue.

burnwood.description: A social networking platform for intellectually curious individuals seeking meaningful connections. Trade shallow dopamine hits for genuine conversation and in-person connection among verified minds.

helioswarm.tagline: The Physical Layer for Sovereign AI
helioswarm.description: A decentralized AI inference network powered by distributed NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano devices running on solar energy. Converting solar power into verified green AI compute credits.

neurosignal.description: A modern machine learning-based high-frequency trading bot for cryptocurrency markets. Leveraging advanced neural networks to identify and execute profitable trading opportunities in milliseconds.

autodba.description: An AI-powered diagnostic and optimization platform for SQL Server databases. Run a diagnostic snapshot, upload securely, and receive expert-level recommendations with actionable T-SQL fixes, impact estimates, and rollback commands.

features.ai: AI-powered analysis that learns with every snapshot
features.diagnostics: Configuration, index, wait stats & query diagnostics

softwareDev.headline: Software That Integrates AI Where It Actually Matters
softwareDev.subheadline: From AI-powered applications to LLM integrations, we build software that delivers real intelligence — not just a chatbot bolted on.

fullstack.title: AI-Powered Application Development
fullstack.description: End-to-end development of web and mobile applications with AI capabilities built in from the ground up, not added as an afterthought.

api.title: LLM Integration & AI APIs
api.description: Integrate large language models and AI services into your products — from OpenAI and Anthropic to self-hosted models — with production-grade reliability.

cloud.title: Cloud-Native Applications
cloud.description: Applications built for the cloud from day one with containerization, CI/CD pipelines, and the scalability to handle AI workloads.

legacy.title: Legacy System Modernization
legacy.description: Breathe new life into aging systems. We migrate and modernize without disrupting your operations — and position you for AI readiness.

testimonials.quote: Samix Technology built the LeakReport app for us, completely simplifying our report generation process in the field. What used to take hours of paperwork now happens in a few taps.
testimonials.author: Emmanuel, Canasolutions

seo.title: Custom Software Development Services | Samix Technology
seo.description: Expert custom software development — full-stack, API design, cloud-native apps, and legacy modernization. Get a free consultation today.

dataEng.headline: The Data Infrastructure That Makes AI Possible
dataEng.subheadline: AI is only as good as the data behind it. We design AI-augmented pipelines and platforms that handle structured and unstructured data at scale.

etl.title: AI-Augmented Pipeline Design
etl.description: Intelligent data pipelines that don't just move data — they validate, enrich, and flag anomalies automatically using ML-based quality checks.

warehouse.title: Data Warehousing & Lakehouse Architecture
warehouse.description: Modern lakehouse and warehouse architecture on Snowflake, Databricks, BigQuery, or Redshift — built for both BI and AI workloads.

realtime.title: Automated Data Quality Monitoring
realtime.description: Proactive monitoring that catches data issues before they reach your models or dashboards, with automated alerting and root-cause analysis.

governance.title: LLM Integration for Unstructured Data
governance.description: Unlock value in documents, emails, and text with LLM-powered extraction, classification, and embedding pipelines integrated into your data platform.

testimonials.quote: The real-time analytics platform Samix built on Azure — with streaming analytics from our greenhouses and data collection tablets feeding into a data lake — has transformed our BI capabilities and given us insights we never had before.
testimonials.author: Rachid Habchane, Azura Group

testimonials.quote: Samix created our master data universe, bringing together all our disparate data sources into one coherent system. It's been a game-changer for how we manage and leverage our data.
testimonials.author: Ashish, Daly Credit Solutions

seo.title: Data Engineering Services | Samix Technology
seo.description: Expert data engineering — ETL pipelines, data warehousing, real-time analytics, and data governance. Get a free consultation today.

dba.headline: DBA Services Amplified by AI Tooling We Built Ourselves
dba.subheadline: We don't just offer traditional DBA services — we bring AutoDBA, an AI-powered diagnostic platform built in-house, to bear on your SQL Server environment.

performance.title: AI-Powered Diagnostics & Analysis
performance.description: AutoDBA analyzes configuration, index health, wait stats, and query patterns to surface expert-level recommendations with actionable T-SQL fixes.

availability.title: Predictive Performance Tuning
availability.description: Move from reactive firefighting to predictive tuning — identifying performance degradation trends before they become outages.

backup.title: Intelligent Monitoring & Alerting
backup.description: AI-driven monitoring that distinguishes signal from noise, so you get alerted on what matters and not overwhelmed by false positives.

security.title: Security Hardening & Compliance
security.description: Database security audits, encryption, access controls, and compliance configurations that keep threats out and auditors satisfied.

creator.heading: Built by a DBA, for DBAs
creator.description: Our DBA practice is led by Evan Barke, a database performance specialist with 15+ years of experience optimizing SQL Server environments. He even built AutoDBA at Samix Technology — combining years of real-world expertise with cutting-edge AI to solve the problems DBAs face every day.
creator.closing: We understand your challenges because we've lived them.

seo.title: Database Administration (DBA) Services | Samix Technology
seo.description: Expert DBA services — performance tuning, high availability, backup & recovery, and security hardening. Get a free consultation today.

consulting.headline: Cut Through the AI Hype. Build What Actually Works.
consulting.subheadline: We help you identify where AI delivers genuine ROI, design the architecture to support it, and make technology decisions grounded in practical experience — not vendor pitches.

architecture.title: AI Readiness & ROI Assessment
architecture.description: An honest evaluation of where AI integration will move the needle for your business versus where it adds complexity without value.

assessment.title: Architecture Review for AI-Ready Platforms
assessment.description: Assess your current data and application architecture against what's needed to support AI workloads reliably and at scale.

augmentation.title: Tool Selection & Vendor Assessment
augmentation.description: Navigate the crowded AI and data tooling landscape with independent, vendor-neutral guidance based on real-world implementation experience.

optimization.title: Data Strategy & Modernization Roadmap
optimization.description: A clear path from your current state to an AI-ready data platform — prioritized by business impact and sequenced for realistic execution.

seo.title: AI & Technology Strategy Consulting | Samix Technology
seo.description: Practical AI strategy and technology consulting — AI readiness assessment, architecture review, tool selection, and data modernization roadmap. Get a free consultation today.

leakreportSupport.title: LeakReport Support
leakreportSupport.subtitle: Help for the LeakReport mobile app
leakreportSupport.intro: LeakReport is a professional leak detection reporting platform. Use this page to get help, find user guides, and contact support.
leakreportSupport.userGuidesDescription: Step-by-step guides for technicians (mobile app) and office admins (dashboard).
leakreportSupport.gettingStartedDescription: Install the app, log in with your technician credentials, and sync leak types and phrases from the server. Start from today's scheduled interventions or create a new intervention.
leakreportSupport.offlineModeDescription: Work without network: take photos and notes in basements or utility rooms. Data saves locally and syncs when you're back online.
leakreportSupport.syncIssuesTips: Check your internet connection, tap the sync button manually, ensure you're logged in, and try closing and reopening the app.
leakreportSupport.loginIssuesTips: Verify your username and password with your administrator. Check your internet connection.
leakreportSupport.aiSuggestionsTips: AI requires an internet connection. Check if AI is enabled (contact your admin). Try again after a few seconds.
leakreportSupport.contactSupportDescription: For technical support, contact your system administrator or the team that provided your LeakReport access.
